sub_modules.fp_unpack: Extracts IEEE-754 sign, exponent, significand, and class flags for one operand.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Detects and produces results for NaNs, infinities, and signed zero pairs before normal arithmetic.
sub_modules.fp_align: Aligns significands to a common effective exponent with guard, round, and sticky precision.
sub_modules.fp_addsub: Adds or subtracts aligned significands according to effective operand signs and returns magnitude/sign.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the arithmetic result, applies round-to-nearest-even, handles overflow and denormal packing.
